/.title: Karmana | Luxury Travel Redefined

/.keywords: luxury travel, concierge, flights, hotels, Karmana

/about.title: About Us | Karmana Luxury Travel

/contact.title: Contact Us | Karmana Luxury Travel

/flight-booking.title: Book Flights | Karmana Luxury Travel

/flight-booking.keywords: book flights, luxury flights, business class, first class, flight booking

/hotel-booking.title: Book Hotels | Karmana Luxury Travel
/hotel-booking.description: Discover and book luxury hotels and resorts worldwide. Exclusive rates on 5-star properties curated by Karmana.
/hotel-booking.keywords: book hotels, luxury hotels, resort booking, 5 star hotels

/holiday-packages.title: Holiday Packages | Karmana Luxury Travel
/holiday-packages.description: Explore all-inclusive luxury holiday packages. Curated journeys with flights, hotels, and private transfers included.

/services.description: Explore Karmana's premium travel services including flight booking, hotel reservations, visa assistance, and concierge support.

/terms.title: Terms & Conditions | Karmana Luxury Travel
/terms.description: Read Karmana's terms and conditions governing the use of our luxury travel services and website.

/privacy.title: Privacy Policy | Karmana Luxury Travel
/privacy.description: Understand how Karmana collects, uses, and protects your personal data when using our travel services.

/refund.description: Learn about Karmana's refund and cancellation policies for flights, hotels, and holiday packages.

/help-center.title: Help Center | Karmana Luxury Travel
